basics.name: Milan Patel
basics.label: FullStack Developer
basics.summary: Motivated PHP Laravel Developer with experience in developing dynamic web applications, RESTful APIs, and database-driven systems. Skilled in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, NodeJs, JavaScript, and Git with a strong focus on clean code, performance optimization, and scalable backend development.

work.name: Agami Tech
work.summary: Maintained and extended an existing Laravel-based product, implementing new business requirements, fixing bugs, and improving system performance.Utilizing JavaScript, AngularJS, Node.js, and Socket.io to create dynamic and responsive user interfaces.Managing MySQL databases, writing optimized queries to enhance application performance.
highlights: Maintain scalable backend systems using PHP and Laravel
Built RESTful APIs consumed by AngularJS frontend applications
Worked on WebRTC-based communication systems for real-time user interaction
Optimized SQL queries and database performance

work.name: Agami Tech
work.summary: Developed web application features using Laravel, PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, gaining hands-on experience in full-stack web development.
highlights: Developed web application features using Laravel, PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Implemented backend logic and database queries for dynamic web functionality
Built responsive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Gained hands-on experience with MVC architecture and modern web development practices

projects.name: Task Manager
projects.description: Developed a task management web application using the Laravel framework and Tailwind CSS. The application allows users to create, manage, and track their tasks efficiently. Implemented features such as user authentication, task categorization, and deadline reminders. Utilized Laravel's Eloquent ORM for database interactions and Tailwind CSS for responsive and visually appealing UI design.
highlights: Built a task management system using Laravel, PHP, MySQL, and Tailwind CSS.
Implemented authentication, email verification, and authorization for secure access control.
Developed CRUD operations for managing tasks and categories.
Used migrations, seeders, factories, and DTO pattern for structured data handling and development efficiency.
Implemented rate limiting to enhance application security.

projects.name: Expense tracker
projects.description: Developed an Expense tracking application using Core PHP with OOP principles. The application allows users to track their expenses. Implemented features such as session-based authentication, file upload functionality for receipts, and CRUD operations to manage expenses and categories.
highlights: Built an Expense tracking application using Core PHP with OOP principles
Implemented Dependency Injection container and DTO pattern for better application structure
Developed session-based authentication and file upload functionality
Created CRUD operations to manage expenses and categories.

projects.name: URL Shortener
projects.description: Developed a URL shortening service using Node.js and JavaScript that generates short links for long URLs and redirects users to the original URL.
